title: Customizable Elytra
description: Allows you to dye/place banners on Elytra
body:
![Customizable Elytra Banner](https://i.imgur.com/I2Iecc2.png)
Allows Elytra to be dyed and have banners placed onto them, in the same way as leather armor and shields




New in 1.20: Supports Armor Trims!
## Additional Features ### Works with Capes!
(You can also hide your cape from appearing on your elytra by just crafting it with a piece of paper!) ### Glow in the Dark! Craft with a Glow Ink Sac to make your elytra glow in the dark!

(Also works with Upgrade Aquatic's and Caves & Cliff's Backport Glow Ink Sacs in 1.16!) ## FAQ ### Is this mod compatible with banners added from other mods? As of the latest version, the following mods are compatible: Additional Banners, Rats, Ice and Fire, Autumnity, Buzzier Bees, Neapolitan, Alex's Mobs and Penguin-Lib ### Will my enchantments/custom name stay if I customize my elytra? Yes, any changes you made to your elytra will be preserved if you customize it ### How do I remove the customization? You can right-click on a cauldron while holding your Elytra to turn it back into a Vanilla one, or split it into two wings by putting it alone in a crafting table.
